title: Lamb Stew for a Cold Night
description: A hearty, flavorful stew made with tender lamb and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the broth, tomatoes, and lamb back to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
